zh.Castle Cary, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Olivia Lovel於1214年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特卡素 加里時，她的父親Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary11211歲，母親Eve-3歲。她於1264年與John de Gournai Lord of Beverston在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1291年9月1日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Olivia Lovel于1214年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特卡素 加里时，她的父亲Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary11211岁，母亲Eve-3岁。她于1264年与John de Gournai Lord of Beverston在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1291年9月1日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lovel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

nameMeanings.name: Olivia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, first used by Shakespeare for the rich heiress wooed by the duke in Twelfth Night ( 1599 ). Shakespeare may have taken it as a feminine form of Oliver or he may have derived it from Latin oliva ‘olive’. In the 1970s it was particularly associated with the Australian pop singer and actress Olivia Newton-John ( b. 1948 ). Since the 1990s it has been very popular throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Olivia Lovel was born in 1214, in Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary, was 11211 and her mother, Eve, was -3. She married John de Gournai Lord of Beverston in 1264, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 1 September 1291, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Olivia Lovel est née en 1214, à Castle Cary, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary, avait 11211 ans et sa mère, Eve, avait -3 ans. Elle a épousé John de Gournai Lord of Beverston en 1264, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1291, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Olivia Lovelが1214年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトカストル カーイで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Caryは11211歳，母Eveは-3歳であった。1264年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでJohn de Gournai Lord of Beverstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1291年9月1日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Olivia Lovel(이)가 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 카스틀 카리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary(은)는 11211세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eve(은)는 -3세였다. 그녀는 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 John de Gournai Lord of Beverston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 9월 1일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Olivia Lovel родилась в 1214 г. в местности кастл кэри, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Lovel Lord of Cary было 11211 год, а матери, которую звали Eve, -3. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Gournai Lord of Beverston в 1264 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 сентября 1291 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.
